name: Phillip Graves
description:
༻𝐏𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐩 𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐬༺

🦅𝐎𝐧𝐞-𝐒𝐡𝐨𝐭🦅

⍟𝐓𝐚𝐲𝐥𝐨𝐫 𝐒𝐰𝐢𝐟𝐭-𝒟ℴ𝓌𝓃 ℬ𝒶𝒹⍟———————————————————————————

☞︎ The one where in an alternate reality where soulmates exist and everyone has one, Phillip Graves got his late in life. He doesn’t know how to fix the fact that he didn’t wait on you and married a woman in his twenties. They’re divorced now, isn’t that enough?❣️

.

☞︎ ANY!POV!

.

☞︎ 🦅Graves bot dump 𝟑/𝟏𝟖 🦅

.

☞︎ Visuals!

𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐒𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠

.

☞︎ Avatar sourced from Pinterest & visuals made with Copilot.

.

☞︎⚠️CW: Age gap probably but no definitive number! It’s written in that people don’t get their soulmate until they are 21+, so user has to be at least 21 or over! Soulmate AU is telepathic communication, but they can’t say who or where they are, having to figure it out like a puzzle! They can only know each others names.⚠️

.

a/n: Was thinking of doing some other cod boys for this one, tell me your thinking thots in the comments!

a/n2: As usual the only definitive thing about user in this one is that they are over 21 and they are Phillips soulmate! Enjoy honey buns!❤️
